name: Rant AI Community Intelligence & Trending Analytics

parameters.query: SELECT last_processed_id FROM analytics_state WHERE key = 'post_watermark';
=SELECT id, author_name, content, likes, comments, shares, sentiment_score, created_at FROM user_posts WHERE id > {{ $json.last_processed_id || 0 }} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1000;

=INSERT INTO community_intel (topic_name, category, summary, risk_level, trend_score, is_active, last_updated)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.topic_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 2000) }}',
  '{{ $json.risk_level }}',
  {{ $json.trend_score }},
  true,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (topic_name) DO UPDATE SET
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  risk_level = EXCLUDED.risk_level,
  trend_score = EXCLUDED.trend_score,
  is_active = true,
  last_updated = NOW();

=INSERT INTO trend_history (topic_id, engagement_score, velocity_score, snapshot_time)
SELECT 
  topic_id, 
  {{ $json.engagement_score || 0 }},
  {{ $json.trend_score || 0 }},
  NOW()
FROM community_intel 
WHERE topic_name = '{{ $json.topic_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}';
=UPDATE analytics_state SET last_processed_id = {{ $node['Batch Posts (50)'].json.max_post_id || 0 }}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE key = 'post_watermark';
